description: Techletes' agentic software development workflow framework: lean planning, pragmatic implementation, TDD where useful, debugging, review, and delivery workflows for coding agents.

defaultPrompt: Help me plan and implement this feature using the Techletes workflow.
Review this issue and propose the smallest useful implementation path.
Debug this failing test or bug systematically.
Finish this branch and prepare it for review.
interface.longDescription: Use Techletes Superpowers to guide coding agents through practical software delivery workflows: deciding what not to build, planning only when useful, implementing minimal working changes, using tests where they add value, debugging systematically, reviewing changes, and finishing branches cleanly.
interface.shortDescription: Lean planning, implementation, debugging, review, and delivery workflows for coding agents

name: techletes-superpowers
